title: Battle of Helska IV
content:
{{Top|ffa|leg}} {{Youmay|the battle that culminated in the destruction of [[Helska IV]]|the [[Skirmish at Helska IV|opening engagement]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]|linebreak=1}} {{Battle |prev=[[Battle of Dubrillion]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' |conc= |next=*[[Battle of Seline]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *[[Battle of Vonak]]The [[Battle of Vonak|battle]] at [[Vonak]] appears in [[Invasion 0|''Star Wars: Invasion'' 0]]. That issue places the beginning of the ''[[Star Wars: Invasion]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series shortly after the events of the ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' novel. As the Battle of [[Helska IV]] is the last event in ''Vector Prime'', it must be followed by the Vonak battle. |image= |name=Battle of Helska IV |conflict=[[Yuuzhan Vong War]] |date=[[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] (c. [[Great ReSynchronization|60:5]]) |place=[[Helska IV]] |result=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] victory **Helska IV destroyed **[[Praetorite Vong]] forces destroyed *The [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet]] begins mobilizing |side1=*New Republic *[[New Jedi Order]] |side2=[[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Warshack Rojo]]† *[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] |commanders2=*[[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] [[Da'Gara]]† *A [[Unidentified yammosk|yammosk]]† |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*1 [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] **''[[Rejuvenator]]''† *6 [[Ranger-class gunship|''Ranger''-class gunships]] *[[Cruiser/Legends|Cruisers]] *[[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]] *1 custom [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] **''[[Jade Sabre]]'' *1 modified [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]]''[[Millennium Falcon Owner's Workshop Manual]]'' **[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] *1 [[iceborer]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]] **''[[Merry Miner]]'' *1 iceborer *6 [[Shieldship]]s *6 [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] |forces2=*[[Praetorite Vong]]† **Thousands of [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]] **[[Grutchin]]s{{CSWECite|III|90|''Rejuvenator''}} **[[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|warriors]] **Armaments of 3 ground-based [[Koros-Strohna|worldships]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*''Rejuvenator'' *Commander Rojo *[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Knight [[Miko Reglia]] *Numerous cruisers and attack [[Starship/Legends|craft]] *3 ''Ranger''-class [[Gunship/Legends|gunships]] *4 shieldships |casual2=*Majority of the Praetorite Vong forces **Many coralskippers **Prefect Da'Gara **The [[yammosk]] **Prefect [[Ma'Shraid]] |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Dialogue|Han Solo|And what happens when the planet starts up again?|Jacen Solo|Well, with the expansion created by the ice…|Leia Organa Solo|Luke.|Han Solo|Get out of here! Get out of here! Full retreat!|attr=The New Republic forces realize that Helska IV is about to be no more|src=}} In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], during the initial stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], forces of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Praetorite Vong]] fought the '''Battle of Helska IV''' on the [[Water/Legends|icy]] [[Helska IV|fourth]] [[Planet/Legends|orbital]] of the [[Helska system/Legends|Helska system]]. Upon entering [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] from an [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|source]], the Praetorite Vong, who were the first units of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] to be used in their invasion, proceeded to establish a [[Helska IV base|base]] on Helska IV. However, the New Republic learned of the Praetorite Vong's existence after the invaders committed numerous atrocities, prompting a trio of principal Republic personnel—former [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Politics/Legends|politician]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]—to assemble a task force whose greatest asset was the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Rejuvenator]]''. Although the New Republic strike force held the upper hand at first, it was soon [[Space warfare/Legends|beset]] by thousands of enemy [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]] that executed maneuvers perfectly with each other due to the [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]] capabilities of the Praetorite Vong's [[Unidentified yammosk|yammosk]] war coordinator. As a result, the ''Rejuvenator'' was soon lost, and the New Republic's forces retreated. However, the New Republic forces soon returned to Helska IV to finish what they had started, using [[shieldship]]s that they had acquired to focus the [[yammosk]]'s energy back at the planet and evaporate the ice, which would cool the planet. The plan succeeded, with the low [[Temperature/Legends|temperatures]] causing a [[Mezzicanley Wave]], which in turn caused Helska IV to shatter apart and destroy most of the Praetorite Vong forces there. The disastrous outcome for the Praetorite Vong forces at Helska IV ended their invasion of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], though more Yuuzhan Vong units would soon follow their lead and engage the New Republic. ==Prelude== ===The Yuuzhan Vong arrive=== {{Quote|What do we know of that planet?''"
"''There isn't much in the data banks about the Helska system. There's not an easily inhabitable planet among the seven, and no one's taken the time or trouble to build one up. None of them even have names—just Helska 1 to 7.|Researchers Danni Quee and [[Garth Breise]]|}} In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]—c. [[Great ReSynchronization|60:5]]—the [[Praetorite Vong]], the leading forces for an [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]], arrived in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. [[Da'Gara]], a Yuuzhan Vong [[Prefect/Legends|prefect]], led the first part of the Praetorite Vong units in a [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]] to [[Helska IV]], an [[Water/Legends|icy]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Da'Gara established a [[Helska IV base|base]] on the world, while [[Gender/Legends|his]] [[Da'Gara's worldship|worldship]] resided in—and partially stuck out of—the icy crust of the planet, since the Yuuzhan Vong had found that the world would be an ideal staging area for their invasion.''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' Meanwhile, Yuuzhan Vong agent [[Nom Anor]] kept the bulk of the forces of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy's]] main government, near the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], as he sowed disorder and conflict through manipulation. Soon after arriving at Helska IV, a group of [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] from the [[Extragalactic Society]]'s [[ExGal-4|research base]] on the world [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]] traveled to Helska IV to investigate an [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] object that they had seen entering the [[Helska system/Legends|Helska system]], which was, in fact, the Praetorite Vong's worldship. However, the group was captured, and only the young scientist [[Danni Quee]] survived to be taken [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]]. Meanwhile, a [[Yomin Carr|Yuuzhan Vong]] agent on Belkadan released a [[Bioweapon/Legends|bioweapon]] on the world, [[Terraforming/Legends|terraforming]] it for the invaders' purposes. Visitors soon arrived at the Praetorite Vong's doorstep once again, this [[Time/Legends|time]] in the form of the [[Kyp's Dozen|Dozen and Two Avengers]], a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] led by the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Kyp Durron]] and [[Miko Reglia]]. The squadron had tracked the group of scientists to the Helska [[Star system/Legends|system]] after checking the data of a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] buoy and, when they arrived in the system, were [[Skirmish at Helska IV|attacked]] by the [[yorik-et]] starfighters–also known as coralskippers–that the Praetorite Vong possessed. Although they at first held their own, the Dozen and Two Avengers were soon [[Space warfare/Legends|cut apart]] by the [[Alien/Legends|alien]] capabilities of the coralskippers, and all the starfighter [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] but Durron and Reglia were [[Death/Legends|killed]]. Reglia himself was captured by the enemy. The Praetorite Vong then [[Destruction of Sernpidal|attacked]] the planet [[Sernpidal/Legends|Sernpidal]], causing its [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Dobido]] to [[Yo'gand's Core|crash]] into its surface and destroy the majority of the planet. From there, Da'Gara's forces pursued [[Refugee/Legends|refugees]] to the planet [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]], where the New Republic [[Battle of Dubrillion|repelled]] the Yuuzhan Vong with the help of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Knights [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], and [[Anakin Solo]], along with their [[Parent/Legends|parents]], former [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and the [[Politics/Legends|politician]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. In response to the attack, which was actually a probe by the enemy forces, Organa Solo and the other New Republic–affiliated personnel on Dubrillion, such as Solo and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], started to arrange for a counterstrike against the Praetorite Vong forces on Helska IV. ===Destination: Helska IV=== {{Quote|We should go straight to Helska. The Ranger gunships will handle any of the smaller—what did you call them? Coralskippers?—while ''Rejuvenator'' takes out whatever base these barbarians have set up. It will be a clean sweep, I assure you, and then we can get on with the more important issues facing the New Republic.|Commander Rojo|}} [[File:Helska4.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Helska IV was the site of the Praetorite Vong base.]] Speculating that the enemy must have a base underneath the ice crust of Helska IV, Skywalker planned to take an [[iceborer]] to the planet in the underbelly of the small [[Carrier/Legends|carrier]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] ''[[Merry Miner]]'', piloted by his [[Marriage/Legends|wife]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker]], a Jedi Master who was fighting a Yuuzhan Vong–[[Bioengineering/Legends|engineered]] [[Coomb spore|disease]]. Skywalker intended to penetrate the ice cover in the iceborer and return from his mission before a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] led by the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Rejuvenator]]'' arrived in the Helska system; the ''Rejuvenator'', helmed by [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Warshack Rojo]], had arrived at Dubrillion shortly after the Praetorite Vong attack there. However, before Skywalker and his wife could execute their plan, Jacen and Jaina took the ''Merry Miner'' and its iceborer on the mission themselves, as they did not think the pair of Jedi Masters were the right ones for the task. Shortly after, the fleet itself departed for Helska IV, despite Organa Solo's attempts to make Rojo wait for additional reinforcements. With Jaina piloting the ''Merry Miner'' and Jacen situated in the iceborer, which was housed in a launch tube in the ''Merry Miner'', they reached the Helska system before the task force. Jaina brought the ship near Helska IV by putting the system's [[Star/Legends|sun]], [[Helska system's star|Helska]], behind them to shield them from enemy view. When the ''Merry Miner'' was close enough, Jaina launched the iceborer toward the planet. The iceborer was supposed to make it to the surface without using [[Engine/Legends|thrusters]] to avoid detection by the enemy, but Jacen heard a call through [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] telling him that an individual was in danger on the planetary surface, and he used the borer's thrusters to change his course toward the call's location. His new course alerted nearby coralskippers to his position, and, though Jacen punched through the ice in his ship with the help of a [[Thermal bomb|thermal charge]], the Praetorite Vong starfighters tracked its trajectory back to the ''Merry Miner''. Forced to retreat in a defenseless ship, Jaina tried to evade them by using the sun for cover but found herself trapped on the other side of the sun, with coralskippers surrounding her from all directions. ==The battle== ===Initial assault=== {{Quote|This is Rojo. Let's take it right to their home.|Commander Rojo, during the engagement near the Helska sun|}} The New Republic task force arrived in the system so close to the ''Merry Miner'' that it was able to immediately engage the coralskippers that were pursuing it, coming to Jaina's rescue. The task force was composed of the ''Rejuvenator'', six new [[Ranger-class gunship|''Ranger''-class gunships]], a collection of [[Cruiser/Legends|cruisers]] and starfighters, Skywalker and his wife flying the [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] ''[[Jade Sabre]]'', and Durron leading a starfighter unit. The upgraded [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] was also present in the task force, piloted by Organa Solo and her husband, with the craft being [[Gunner/Legends|gunned]] by Anakin and entrepreneur [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], who was operating out of Dubrillion. The New Republic forces quickly mopped up the majority of the enemy forces and headed for Helska IV to attack the Praetorite Vong forces there. Meanwhile, Jacen had entered the chilly waters of the planet, wearing a captured Yuuzhan Vong [[ooglith cloaker]] to shield him from the cold; upon seeing a group of Yuuzhan Vong warriors, who were going after Reglia to [[Torture/Legends|torture]] him in an attempt to [[Breaking|break]] his mind, Jacen joined them because they were going toward the source of the call. Disguised as a member of the [[warrior caste]] thanks to the cloaker, Jacen entered a room in the ice crust with them, where he found the prisoners Reglia and Quee. Though Reglia was a Jedi, it was actually the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] Quee who had put out the call for help, and Jacen then engaged the warriors in order to free the pair of prisoners. [[File:Coralskipper_SotG.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Cordinated coralskipper attacks initially drove the New Republic forces away from Helska IV.]] Knowing that the task force was closing in on Helska IV, Da'Gara sent thousands of coralskippers of various sizes to engage the enemy forces, who were hounding the fighters that he had used to draw the New Republic forces closer to his world. Additionally, the planet was protected by the [[Force field/Legends|energy field]] of the [[Unidentified yammosk|yammosk]] war coordinator that was on Helska IV, the [[Volcano/Legends|volcano]] armaments of the three worldships that the Praetorite Vong possessed, as well as many [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]]-manipulating [[dovin basal]]s. The New Republic task force was suddenly set upon by the multitude of enemy fighters, who were all bound together [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathically]] by the abilities of the [[yammosk]]; the telepathic link allowed the coralskippers to execute brilliant maneuvers and fly better. Two of the ''Ranger''-class [[Gunship/Legends|gunships]] were soon destroyed after a Praetorite Vong fighter used a dovin basal to draw all three of them into a collision. Elsewhere, the rest of the task force was hard-pressed, and the ''Rejuvenator'' itself became the main target of the coralskippers and the insect-like [[grutchin]]s. Rojo called for help from the rest of the fleet, but as they were all otherwise occupied with enemy fighters or unable to reach the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]], the Corellian began to [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|bombard]] Helska IV in retaliation for the continued assault on his ship. The ''Rejuvenator'' did not last long, however, and because of the coralskipper-inflicted damage, a volley of [[magma missile]]s from [[Yaret-Kor|volcano cannons]] that lifted off from the surface of the planet annihilated the Star Destroyer, killing Rojo and the vast majority of on-board personnel.''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' The Star Destroyer's destruction led the task force's leaders to signal a retreat from the system, though the ''Jade Sabre'', the ''Millennium Falcon'', and the ''Merry Miner'' attempted a last-ditch effort to extract Jacen from Helska IV before the retreat. During the battle, Jacen had fought off all the warriors with the help of Reglia and Quee, though the former sacrificed himself in order to kill some of the warriors. Afterward, Jacen had managed to get Quee and himself back to the iceborer. The trio of ships coming to rescue Jacen made it near to the surface of Helska IV, and after the iceborer extracted itself from the ice, allowing the ''Merry Miner'' to scoop it up in mid-air, all the ships escaped to hyperspace after their allies. ===A new plan=== {{Dialogue|Anakin Solo|We can shut the volcanoes off. Or at least we can freeze the water around them.|Han Solo|How're we going to do that? It's already almost as cold around the planet as it can be.|Anakin Solo|Almost. But not quite.|Luke Skywalker|Absolute zero? How are we going to do that?|Anakin Solo|Evaporation.|attr=The leaders of the New Republic force formulate a new plan|src=}} Soon after leaving the area around Helska IV, the three ships rendezvoused to formulate a plan for eliminating the Praetorite Vong threat. A consensus was reached that it would be possible to freeze the yammosk to death by using [[shieldship]]s to reflect the yammosk's energy back at the planet; doing so would speed up evaporation on the surface, cooling the planet even further and hopefully achieving a [[Temperature/Legends|temperature]] of absolute zero. Shieldships were brought from among Calrissian's collection of technology at Dubrillion and its sister world of [[Destrillion]], and a small task force was assembled from the survivors of the original force. However, some survivors, including the remaining three ''Ranger''-class gunships, opted to stay behind at Destrillion to wait for reinforcements. By launching their attack so shortly after their recent defeat, the New Republic forces aimed to catch the enemy unaware, since the majority of the Praetorite Vong fighters were out looking for the survivors. The task force came in via hyperspace extremely close to the fourth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] of Helska, and, as a result, one of the cruisers that had come with them and a quartet of starfighters were lost in collisions with each other or the planet itself. [[File:Solokids.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The Solo siblings all played a role in the Battle of Helska IV.]] The half-dozen shieldships then took up position around the planet, decreasing their orbit with every rotation as the energy from the yammosk started to be reflected back upon the world. Coralskippers attacked the New Republic forces, and the New Republic starfighters worked to either provide cover for the shieldships or act as decoys. Skywalker also took an [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]] to act as a decoy, and Da'Gara, who was confused by the small size of the attacking force, readily sent a contingent of fighters to engage it. As the yammosk was unafraid of the shieldships' attempts to reflect its energy, Da'Gara was similarly unconcerned with the shieldships, and he proceeded to call the scattered coralskipper hordes back to Helska IV to defend it and deal the finishing blow to the enemy. By that time, the shieldships's efforts had begun to evaporate the surface of the planet, generating a thick fog and cooling the planet. That same fog aided Skywalker by providing cover as he tried to draw the coralskippers away from the shieldships. While the ''Jade Sabre'' and the ''Millennium Falcon'' defended the shieldships, Jade Skywalker, serving as the former ship's gunner, suffered a relapse in her illness that left her unconscious. Because of its lack of a gunner, the ''Jade Sabre'' suffered numerous hits despite maneuvering attempts by its pilot, Jaina Solo, and the craft began to descend toward the planet below. Skywalker saved the falling ship, however, as he came underneath the ''Jade Sabre'', flipped his X-wing on its back, and fired his [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlifts]]—thus giving the ''Jade Sabre'' the boost it needed to regain control and altitude. Thanks to the shieldships' efforts, Helska IV's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] was becoming increasingly colder, and, though the New Republic forces suffered losses of starfighters and a few shieldships, they soon caught a break. Due to the extreme cold that the evaporation was generating, the yammosk started to lose its control on the coralskippers, and their maneuvers began to cost the Yuuzhan Vong fighters as pilots crashed into one another. The yammosk had actually entered a deep freeze because the fourth state of matter, known as the [[Mezzicanley Wave]], had been achieved; the planet itself started to slow in its [[Standard day/Legends|rotations]] as the fog evaporated completely from the atmosphere. The majority of the coralskippers present in the battle returned to Helska IV, confused by the events and aiming to protect the base. However, the leaders of the New Republic task force realized that the expansion created by the freezing water under Helska IV's ice crust would be disastrous, and they issued a retreat. The New Republic ships had not gone far before the planet exploded as a result of the ice expansion, destroying the majority of the Praetorite Vong forces and killing Da'Gara. Skywalker, who was still in the atmosphere when the Mezzicanley Wave was created, barely managed to escape the destruction in his X-wing. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Prefect Da'Gara and the Praetorite Domains—what did their blasphemous actions earn them but ice graves on what little remains of Helska 4, so far removed from Yuuzhan'tar it might as well be in the galaxy we left behind?|[[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]]|''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''}} Following the destruction of Helska IV, New Republic squadrons hunted down the remaining coralskippers that had survived the battle. Because of the Praetorite Vong's defeat, their reputation suffered greatly among the rest of the Yuuzhan Vong [[Species/Legends|species]], not to mention the loss of a large portion of their forces.''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'' The battle had a negative effect on Jade Skywalker, and her illness gained the upper hand, leaving her weaker. In response to the battle, which became known as the Battle of Helska IV,{{CSWECite|II|33|Helska IV}} Organa Solo organized meetings with important officials to warn the galaxy at large of the threat that the Yuuzhan Vong posed, though the governing body of the New Republic chose to ignore it, believing that the Praetorite Vong were the last of the extra-galactic forces. Meanwhile, Nom Anor continued to sow disorder in the form of civil wars, and the main Yuuzhan Vong force soon arrived. They [[Evacuation of Dubrillion|struck]] again at Dubrillion, this time capturing it, and proceeded to [[Battle of Dantooine (Yuuzhan Vong War)|attack]] the planet [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] before engaging New Republic and [[Imperial Remnant]] forces at the planet [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]. From there on, it was an all-out battle for control of the galaxy between the two sides.''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' ==Behind the scenes== The Battle of Helska IV first appeared in the novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'', written by [[R. A. Salvatore]] and published in [[1999]] as the first installment in [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series. The battle was later mentioned in other books in that series, as well as in ''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'', released in [[2002]]. ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', released in [[2008]], first identified the battle by name in an entry on the planet Helska IV. The fighting at Helska IV was also mentioned in [[Daniel Wallace]] and [[Jason Fry]]'s ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', released in [[2009]]. There are a few inconsistences in the sources that mention the Battle of Helska IV. In ''Vector Prime'', the book contradicts itself about the number of cruisers that join the second part of the assault on the planet, as it says only one joined but later has two destroyed during the battle. ''The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia''{{'s}} ''Merry Miner'' entry incorrectly states that the ship was used to launch a [[Warhead/Legends|warhead]], which started the planet's freezing. Schlacht von Helska 4 |es=Batalla de Helska IV |hu=Második helskai csata }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Helska IV, Battle of}} [[Category:Artificial disasters]] [[Category:Battles of Helska IV]] [[Category:Battles of the Yuuzhan Vong War]] [[Category:Genocides and massacres]] [[Category:Rescue missions]]
